conviction_board.name: ONGC
conviction_board.narrative: One thing to watch: momentum is diverging from the trend. The structure is fine but the engine is losing steam. The trend is solidly positive — price sits above all key averages, though alignment isn't perfect. RSI 48. Neutral. Nothing to act on from momentum alone. Volume is thin (0.2x) — take any move with a pinch of salt. Market headwinds are real — 49% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. ₹278 is the line in the sand. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish → Neutral.

conviction_board.name: Apollo Hospitals
conviction_board.narrative: A word of caution — momentum is surging but the moving average structure hasn't confirmed. This could be a counter-trend bounce rather than a genuine reversal. There's no discernible trend. The stock is range-bound and waiting for direction. Buyers are in control (RSI 71), but the stock is getting ahead of itself. Best entries come after a pause. Volume is thin (0.2x) — take any move with a pinch of salt. Market headwinds are real — 49% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. Healthcare is lagging the broader tape (score 36) — an extra headwind. Downside risk towards ₹7,519 is real. Capital preservation first. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Bearish → Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish.
